title: lastrea juergensii
intro: Lastrea juergensii, also known as the Juergens' Lady fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Athyriaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Lastrea juergensii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat wounds, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Lastrea juergensii can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using them in decoctions, allowing for the extraction of its medicinal compounds.
